agent-native-catalog.note: Hard requirement. Applied to all 35 entries. Zero false positives.

yaml-only-direct-push.note: Best practice for data-only commits. No regressions across 3 pushes.

auto-pipeline-for-curation.note: Cross-domain pattern. 5 successful pipeline runs including 6-track parallel enhancement.

execFileSync-over-execSync.note: Security: never use execSync(string). 3 files migrated. No regressions.

test-for-every-skill.note: Every skill MUST have a test file. 12+2=14 untested skills identified and fixed. 47 skills covered.

batch-catalog-additions.reason: Retired: 0 fires, never exercised. The anti-pattern it replaced (incremental-catalog-runs) is sufficiently covered by auto-pipeline-for-curation pattern.

append-not-insert-yaml.reason: Retired: 0 fires, never exercised. The anti-pattern it replaced (mid-file-yaml-edits) is covered by edit-tool-for-yaml-blocks pattern.

jaccard-originality-check.note: Shingle-based Jaccard similarity check. 47 skills checked, worst 19.3%, zero false positives.

verify-gate-before-advance.note: Prevents skipping quality gates. Verified across Phase 1 (10 transitions) and 6-track build.

skill-structural-linter.note: Structural lint check. 47 skills, 41 clean, 6 warnings, 0 errors.

six-track-parallel-execution.note: 6 independent tracks dispatched in parallel with zero file conflicts. 50 files, 5858 insertions.

owasp-security-scan-asi-patterns.note: 40 detection patterns across OWASP ASI01-ASI08. 47 skills scanned, 0 CRITICAL findings.

mcp-discovery-well-known.note: RFC Cloudflare .well-known/agent-skills/index.json format. 47 skill modules indexed with SHA-256 digests.

test-convention-node-test.note: Declare test_convention: node:test before subagent dispatch. Prevented mixed imports during 6-track integration. All new tests use node:test imports.

writeIndex-arg-validation.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. writeIndex('.', '.well-known/agent-skills/index.json') corrupted index. Arg validation now prevents recurrence.

quality-score-persist-check.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. computeAllToolScores() returned correct values but didn't persist. Explicit writeQualityScores() call required.

yaml-edit-use-tool-not-string.note: Validated by D-grade fix session. Inline YAML string construction caused escape errors. Edit tool for YAML blocks prevents this.

deep-research-before-design.note: 4 community patterns (AI-DLC, copilot-orchestra, ABIvan-Tech, Agentic Dev Playbook) validated 5-phase workflow design before writing.

stress-tested-plan-structure.note: 7-section plan structure (CEO, Eng, Design, Risk, Tasks, AC, Decisions) produced comprehensive, low-risk plan.

fn-tostring-schema-generation.note: fn.toString() + regex parses method signatures into JSON Schema for MCP tools. 49 skills auto-schema'd without modification. JSDoc ~10% coverage so name-based fallback critical.

isError-structured-err.note: MCP tool errors must include isError:true + structured content with 'suggestion' field. Agents infer next steps from suggestions.

token-budget-truncation.note: TokenOptimizer caps responses at 4000 tokens. Strategy: first 50% + last 20% with summary preserves context. ANSI strip before truncation.

dead-dep-audit.note: Periodic check for ESM-only deps (chalk v5, ora v7) that cannot be require()'d from CJS. Removed chalk+ora, installed @modelcontextprotocol/sdk.

mcp-server-tested.note: MCP adapter integration tests: listTools, callTool, token optimization, error handling, batch calls. All 11 node:test suites pass.

named-param-schema.note: SchemaGenerator extracts named params from fn.toString(). Agents no longer guess positional _args. Default values included in schema.

eslint-prefer-const.note: Unified .eslintrc.js enforces prefer-const, no-var, eqeqeq, curly, quotes: single, semi. Eliminated .eslintrc.json duplication.

eslint-no-control-regex.note: ANSI regex \x1b triggers no-control-regex. Use String.fromCharCode(27) in IIFE or add rule exception.

static-vs-instance-methods.note: Methods designed as static must be called as ClassName.method(), not this.method(). Consistency prevents runtime errors.

temp-file-cleanup.note: Ad-hoc scripts (regen-index.js) left in root. Ship phase must delete temp files or use .vibe/tmp/.

use-handoff-at-transitions.note: Every phase transition must produce a handoff.md. Prevents context loss between layers. Promoted from proposed.

mcp-sdk-schema-method-literal.note: MCP SDK setRequestHandler expects request schemas with method literals (ListToolsRequestSchema), not Result schemas.

compaction-dedup-window.note: New rule from retro action item. Compaction events must dedupe within 5-min window per project. Prevents 7x spam on rapid session starts.

eslint-cache-flag.note: New rule from retro action item. Harness eslint check must use --cache flag to speed up runs. Currently ~6s bottleneck.

index-md-crossref-validation.note: New harness check from retro action item. Validates every pattern/anti-pattern appears in at least one cross-ref table in INDEX.md. Prevents orphaned learnings.

unified-test-convention.note: New rule consolidating testing cluster (3 anti-patterns: mixed-test-conventions, regex-in-jest-config, skip-test-verification-on-docs-only). Single convention: node:test + always-run + no regex in jest config.

state-json-sync-on-ship.note: Promoted to active (v2.9.0). Auto-update state.json phase to 'done' after git commit. Prevents out-of-sync state between phases.

temp-file-gitignore.note: Promoted to active (v2.9.0). Add *.tmp.js or .vibe/tmp/ patterns to .gitignore. Prevents accidental commits of ad-hoc scripts.

ttlcache-on-hot-paths.note: Promoted v2.9.1. Module-level TTLCache(30000) singleton on QueryEnricher.enrich() keyed on query:goal. Eliminates redundant .vibe/ I/O + git reads within 30s window. Pattern: cache at module scope, not constructor scope.

lazy-load-deferred-require.note: Promoted v2.9.1. CLI entry points must not eagerly require heavy modules at top level. Use getter `get handler() { return require(...) }` to defer to invocation time. Dropped CLI startup from ~400ms to 64ms. Gate: utility commands skip orchestrator entirely.

tdd-before-optimization.note: Promoted v2.9.1. Bolt iterated 3x on bin/vibe.js (153e3a1, 3726dca, c21356e) before landing clean optimization because no tests guarded the behavior. Rule: write/verify tests for the function BEFORE optimizing its internals. Applied: TTLCache + allowBacktrack tests added this session before any future refactor.

independent-verify-agent.note: Promoted from proposed v2.9.1. 6-persona review (CEO/CTO/Designer/QA/Security/PM) caught 12 bugs the build agent missed including arg-order bug in writeGoalBlock, StateMachine scope leak in handoff block, and dead variable in mcp-adapter. Independent review = orthogonal catch surface.

prettier-eslint-sequence.note: Promoted v2.9.2. prettier --write THEN eslint --fix. Prettier reformats; eslint auto-adds curly braces where prettier split single-line ifs onto multiple lines. Reversed order fails — eslint fixes get re-broken by prettier. 200+ files formatted, 0 ESLint errors after sequence.

prettierignore-before-format.note: Promoted v2.9.2. Create .prettierignore BEFORE running prettier --write. Scope away .vibe/, .gsd/, .jules/, *.jsonl, generated dirs. Prevents state file churn and keeps diff reviewable. Without this, prettier formats 500+ files including session telemetry.

format-then-rebuild-index.note: Promoted v2.9.2. After any prettier --write pass touching skills/*/index.js, run: node -e "require('./lib/discovery-index').writeIndex(process.cwd())". Prettier changes whitespace → SHA-256 digest changes → index-json-integrity harness check fails. Caught in this session: 15/16 → 16/16 after rebuild.

npm-files-publish-safety.note: Promoted v2.9.2. Always add 'files' field to package.json for any publishable npm package. Without it: .vibe/ state, .husky/ hooks, test fixtures, and dev configs leak into the npm tarball. List: bin/, lib/, skills/, catalog/, references/, .well-known/, key docs only.

prod-only-audit-in-ci.note: Promoted v2.9.2. Use 'npm audit --omit=dev' in CI, not bare 'npm audit'. Jest devDependencies have 18 unfixable moderate CVEs (babel-jest, jest-snapshot chain). Prod-only audit gives clean signal: 0 real vulnerabilities. Full audit causes alert fatigue and blocks CI on noise.

ci-node-version-matrix.note: Promoted v2.9.2. Run CI matrix across Node LTS (20) + Current (22). Use actions/setup-node with cache: npm. Pin .nvmrc to LTS version to align local dev with lower CI bound. Catches version-specific API changes before they reach users.

pre-commit-index-integrity.note: Promoted v2.9.2. Added checkIndexIntegrity() as Gate 3 in .husky/pre-commit. Catches digest drift at commit time, not CI time. Provides clear fix command in error message. Pattern: catch early, provide fix. Pre-commit is 10x cheaper to fix than CI failure.

type-coerce-before-iterate.note: Promoted v2.9.2. When consuming a value that could be string or array, always coerce: Array.isArray(v) ? v : [String(v)]. The retro.js notes bug (iterating string characters) was caused by implicit type contract between auto-maintain.js (returns string) and retro.js (expected array). 18-item 'A l l' output.

catalog-yaml-valid.note: YAML validated every time. Zero syntax errors across 35 entries.

catalog-category-count.note: Category counts verified. All hitting targets. 6 gap finds.

test-suite.note: 762 Jest tests + 63 node:test = 825 total. 77 Jest suites + 11 node:test suites. All pass after MCP adapter integration.

handoff-templates.note: Verifies all 8 handoff docs exist. Never failed.

phase-gates-doc.note: Verifies gates.md has all phase transitions documented. Never failed.

index-json-integrity.note: Validates .well-known/agent-skills/index.json matches on-disk skills. 49 entries verified (removed deployment/railway duplicate).

quality-scores.note: Validates catalog/quality-scores.json covers all 35 tools. All scored, no D-grade tools.

security-scan.note: OWASP ASI01-ASI08 scan of all 47 skills. 0 CRITICAL findings.

spec-gates-g09-g14.note: 6 new spec enforcement gates (G09-G14). All pass on current skills.

node-test-suite.note: node:test runner for excluded files. 63 tests across 11 suites. SchemaGenerator, TokenOptimizer, PerformanceOptimizer, MCPAdapter all covered.

state-machine-valid.note: Validates state.json state_machine has exactly 6 entries matching 5-phase model: scope, build, verify, ship, evolve, done. Runs added as Check 15.

test-suite-always-run.reason: Retired v2.9.0: 0 runs, never exercised. Redundant with test-suite check which already runs every cycle.

tdd.reason: No production code in curation projects. Rule had zero applicability.

mid-file-yaml-edits.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: append-not-insert-yaml.

incremental-catalog-runs.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: batch-catalog-additions.

verify-before-describe.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: pre-verify-tool-metadata.

pre-verify-tool-metadata.reason: Never implemented. 0 fires. Replaced by test-for-every-skill + regex-in-jest-config.

proposed.description: Harness check: state.json state_machine must be exactly [scope, build, verify, ship, evolve, done]
proposed.rationale: Ensures new 5-phase workflow is enforced; prevents drift back to 11-phase
proposed.trigger: on state.json write and at harness phase

agent-native-tool-discovery.note: ToolRegistry with isUsable() + 3s timeout. 56 skills registered. findUsable/getUnusable eliminates silent deploy failures. 15/15 tests pass.

ci-quality-gates-harness-driven.note: Harness as single source of truth: lint + typecheck + test + validate. 3 new gates (agents-md-exists, eslint-lint-pass, typecheck-gate). 19 checks total.

test-teardown-timeout-prevention.note: Install-ide.test.js leaks async handles causing 131s harness. Need Jest --detectOpenHandles gate or afterAll cleanup. Proposed for next cycle.
